title: Bingus & Floppa
description: This mod adds the legendary cats Bingus and Floppa, who will fight for your honor
body:
![Bingus mod logo (cool)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43a99983d3b2bd626ea0b500270f95b362818995.jpeg)
 
Bingus adds famous funny cats, Bingus and Floppa, as summonable pets that fight on your behalf.

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)
 
 ![Crafting a Bingus tTotem with a diamond, 4 amethyst, and a 4 fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd193a8f865fb4e6656c1fd81ad347f0892d1cb.png)
 
Bingus Totems can be crafted using a diamond, 4 amethyst, and 4 of any fish. You spawn a Bingus from it using Mouse 2. An infinite amount of Binguses can be spawned, provided you have enough totems.

[Note : in the 1.16.5 version, pink dye is used instead of amethyst.]

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)
 
![Crafting a Floppa totem with a Netherite scrap, 4 copper ingots, and 4 fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c7b6d45346e707f411ff90f3e99a6be3b83860a.png)

Floppa Totems are crafted using a netherite scrap, 4 copper, and 4 of any fish. Summoning a Floppa works the same as a Bingus, but Floppas have increased mobility and a special shockwave attack that can launch enemies into the air. 

[Note : Floppas are not available in the 1.18 or 1.16 versions]

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)

![Bingus and Floppa party](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ecb9722b71db1b6bcbb74e41591dae1a4a6394.jpeg)

Binguses can be recalled back into their totems by right clicking them, and they will automatically recall themselves into totems upon death. Bingus Totems stack up to 8, so you can bring a decent amount with you before it begins to clutter your inventory.

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)

![Smelting a Bingus totem into Bingus ears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56692ec78a450a4a9ab14c1bbc13446ae662fdc1.png)

You can cook a Bingus Totem to get Bingus Ears. Bingus Ears have the protection of a Diamond Helmet and worse durability than iron, since one diamond is used up to create them. You are also able to cook a Floppa Totem to get Floppa Ears. 

![Bingus ears on an armor stand and someone wearing Bingus ears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8f9df880b23e9f8234193972af1a1dc16b422f.jpeg)

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)

![An absolutely stunning photo of Bingus, painted with sheer inspiration and love](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3feff94fc4ef6f92dcbcf800814c10bd4b7a1ed.jpeg)

This mod also adds beautiful paintings of both Bingus and Floppa. Place them in your base to support the cause!

![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)
